_comment: Single source of truth for data retention. Edit values here; cleanup DAG and dashboard both read this file. Units: 'days' or 'hours'.

transactions.label: Transactions
transactions.description: Full enriched transaction history kept for investigation, customer profiling and analytics.

flagged_transactions.label: Alerts (flagged)
flagged_transactions.description: AML alerts retained for case management and audit trail.

sar_reports.label: SAR reports
sar_reports.description: GenAI-drafted Suspicious Activity Reports retained for the regulatory review window.

alert_transaction_archive.label: Alert transaction archive
alert_transaction_archive.description: Frozen copy of all customer transactions at alert time — investigation evidence kept as long as the alert.

account_window_metrics.label: Account window metrics
account_window_metrics.description: Transient rolling-window aggregates (daily/weekly/monthly) that Spark rules read each micro-batch. Continuously recomputed from live transactions, so old rows have no analytical value and are expired aggressively to protect disk.
